stocks.impact_theory: Eli Lilly reported stellar Q1 earnings with retatrutide, their new weight loss drug, showing surgical-level efficacy in trials, beating expectations. Economically, this boosts pharma innovation amid obesity epidemic, increasing revenue projections. Market psychology: FOMO on GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic rivals, historical parallel to semaglutide launch in 2022 which doubled LLY in 18 months. Analogies: 1) Like iPhone launch catalyzing Apple dominance; 2) Gold rush in biotech akin to mRNA vaccines post-COVID.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment highly positive on weight loss results (multiple posts on surges), web news confirms 6% premarket jump turning Nasdaq around. Strong earnings beat, raised guidance fuel upward momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15-20% gains in next week on trial hype; entry at $1250, target $1450.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, potential 5-8% pullback if trial side effects emerge; avoid unless overbought.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory delays on retatrutide, competition from Novo Nordisk, broader market rotation from growth to value stocks.

stocks.justification: Multiple confirming sources on earnings beat and drug success; high engagement on X, historical precedent strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Alphabet's Q1 earnings showcased 7% blowout cloud growth and ad resilience; Sergey Brin returning adds innovation buzz. Implications: Accelerates AI/cloud race, stabilizing tech amid rotation. Psychology: Relief rally post-earnings jitters. Parallels: 2023 cloud pivot similar to AWS boom for AMZN. Analogies: 1) Veteran quarterback returning like Brady to Pats; 2) Engine tune-up propelling a supercar.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches highlight 7% jump on cloud; X posts on Brin adding trillions in value; positive sentiment shift from Nasdaq dip.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting 10% upside to $310 on cloud momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if antitrust news resurfaces, potential 4% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: DOJ antitrust case escalation, slowing ad growth from recession fears.

stocks.justification: Solid earnings but mixed tech sentiment; Brin story viral but speculative.

stocks.impact_theory: Amazon beats on AWS acceleration amid AI demand. Economic boost to e-comm/cloud infrastructure. Psychology: Validates capex spend. Parallels: Post-2022 AWS recovery. Analogies: 1) Fuel injection for growth engine; 2) Wind at sails for retail giant.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings winners vs Meta/MSFT losers; X/web confirm 3% up on AWS.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Consumer spending slowdown, high AI capex burn.

stocks.justification: Positive but part of broader tech earnings rotation.

stocks.impact_theory: Caterpillar earnings leap amid infrastructure spend. Implications: Cyclical recovery signal. Psychology: Rotation to industrials. Parallels: Post-2021 infra bill. Analogies: 1) Heavy machinery revving up economy; 2) Tractor pull win.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News on Dow surge led by CAT; turns market around.

stocks.justification: Strong but cyclical, dependent on macro.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla robotaxi fleet hits 650 with 25 unsupervised FSD. Implications: Autonomy monetization nears. Psychology: Hype cycle reignites. Parallels: 2020 battery day. Analogies: 1) Self-driving train leaving station; 2) Robot army mobilization.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts on fleet expansion; tokenized TSLAon popular.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles for FSD, production ramps.

stocks.justification: High volatility, Musk factor; promising but unproven scale.
